creator: dima@Chg.RU
text:
GTK version 1.2.7 has one serious bug, affecting all programs, using
GTK library and non-english fonts.
This bug prevents ALL gtk-based programs to render national language fonts.

Fix: Please apply this patch to gtk/gtkrc.ru file.
It seems that similar patch should be applied to ALL OTHERS gtkrc.[LANG] files
as well.
